creator: sbrabez@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

On Mon, Mar 1, 2010 at 9:10 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of security/w3af,
>
> Please note that PR ports/144396 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/144396
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Please use this following patch attached, it provide a new KNOB in the
ports and do some cleanup.

It  was tested on tinderbox and it's OK, see the build log [1]

Regards

[1] http://atari.bfh.ch/tb/index.php?action=display_markup_log&build=8.0-FreeBSD&id=516

-- 
sbz
